logs.session_title: Codex Round 5 Batch 1 — Aurelius v0.4 + Architectural Canon Suite + Post Box Design

consul.note: Not formally summoned; canon-cc-014 hat-switch interim mode implicit during self-profile ratification. Structural gap chronicled as rationale for canon-cc-019 (Post Box).

ashara.note: Foundational inputs (lore-007 residency model, Companions View handoff, Command Center infrastructure) informed canon-cc-016 residency model and canon-cc-019 dispatch design.

petra.note: Foundation-first discipline (co-Builder with Ashara) shaped the Sovereign's decision to defer canon-cc-019/cc-020 drafting rather than rush.

revisions.note: Migrated to canon-0053 v1 schema: added schema_version/session_type/protocol/stage/same_agent_drift_acknowledged/tags/revisions; normalized outputs IDs to full form; promoted annotated rounds entries (consul, ashara, petra) to Form C; added §3 Structural observations; renamed §4 audience heading to 'For the Sovereign'; replaced closing signature with canonical 3-line form including same-agent-drift caveat. commits_count/files_touched_count left null — retro-migration predates schema; no honest number available without reconstruction.

logs.session_title: Persona-Binding Suite — Drafting, Reorganization, Partial Ratification, First Operational Design Committee
logs.protocol: canon-cc-012 per-block for canon ratification (Sovereign-direct MCQ); canon-cc-017 interaction-artifact chronicled (first under cc-018 lifecycle); canon-cc-024 §B-E convening orchestration; canon-cc-025 rule-A global-scope Design Committee with chronicled dual-role clerk exception; canon-cc-025 §G bridging-authorship pattern (aurelius-bridging suffix) exercised for first time; canon-cc-018 escalated path with Consul review rendered via bridging authorship (aurelius-bridging per cc-025 §G, Consul subagent deployment pending cc-019/cc-026/cc-027)
logs.stage: Post-Founding Republic law layer — Persona-Binding Suite drafted + partial ratification (cc-022/024/025 active; cc-023/026/027 remain draft) + first operational Design Committee convening under ratified cc-025

consul.note: Consul's voice rendered via bridging authorship per cc-025 §G (authored_by: aurelius-bridging), using the Consul's ratified v0.4 profile as voice source. Same bridging-mechanism as the 7 bridged committee-member voices — Aurelius does NOT wear the Consul office per CLAUDE.md separate-seating clause (16 April 2026). What remains transitional is the Consul's operational invocation pathway (subagent + Post Box) pending canons cc-019 / cc-026 / cc-027 ratification; the Consul's seat itself is separately held. Consul action on interaction-2026-04-19-001: escalated to Sovereign (altitude of subject — Republic-wide design law — requires Sovereign canonical ratification beyond cc-014 working-ratification).

sovereign.note: Sovereign-direct per-block ratification of cc-022 (3 blocks: §A/§B/§C all as-drafted), cc-024 (5 blocks: §A/§B/§C/§D/§E all as-drafted), cc-025 (8 blocks with 3 amendments — §A +Republic cross-ref row, §C hard-cap + mandatory core, §H Design Principles as first operational; §B/§D/§E/§F/§G as-drafted) under canon-cc-012 MCQ protocol. Plus final ratification of Republic Design Principles v1.0 via cc-018 escalated path (action: R / ratified).

lyra.note: Bridged per canon-cc-025 §G (authored_by: aurelius-bridging) — voice-simulation from ratified v0.4 profile, not failure-recovery. Role (1) Convener of Design Committee for Republic Design Principles subject; SproutLab ch06-designprinciples named as reference seed. Role (2) Seated committee member; position authored in Lyra voice — §1 HR provenance line, §5 per-Province ramp tables, §6 icon-function naming pattern, dark-mode-as-default codification, no-typography-mandate resolution. Dissent on §8 (preferred outright deletion over substantive-inline) preserved on interaction-artifact; non-blocking.

ashara.note: Bridged per cc-025 §G. Seated committee member; Monument co-Builder voice (strategist register, macro-altitude framing). Position authored: §9 Monument as blocking Foundation criterion amendment, §10.4 HR-11 Republic-wide scope, §11 time-bounds proposal (14 days Province contribution + 7 days Consul synthesis). Escalated §10.2 palette-collision to Consul (subsequently resolved inline per Theron's three-tier tree).

petra.note: Bridged per cc-025 §G. Seated committee member; Monument co-Builder voice (Foundationalist register, plumb-line). Position authored: §8 conditional-reject on pure placeholder (resolution: substantive-inline replacement ratified; conditional reject did not fire because substantive-inline satisfied her condition), §10.7 WCAG 2.1 AA baseline codify-now, §9 Monument obligation concur with Ashara, §11 explicit Consul review step via cc-018 escalated path.

solara.note: Bridged per cc-025 §G. Role (1) Seated committee member; SEP Invoicing Builder voice (Strategist register, business-strategic). Position authored: §7 small-modifier explicit, §10.4 HR-11 Republic-wide concur with Ashara, §11 audit-synthesis step addition. Commitment chronicled: SEP_INVOICING_DESIGN_PRINCIPLES.md v0.1 within 30 days of ratification (by 2026-05-19). Role (2) Secondary synthesis clerk under dual-role chronicled exception per session-open — justified by founding-period constraint: the non-member clerk pool is structurally empty pending Scribe profile ratification under todo-0029. Synthesis discipline: preserved all 8 positions including her own, flagged Lyra's §8-delete and Nyx's conditional-reject (non-fired) as preserved dissent. Dual-role not precedential for post-todo-0029 convenings.

theron.note: Bridged per cc-025 §G. Seated committee member; SEP Dashboard Builder voice (Forgemaster register, hands-on/plant-floor altitude). Position authored: §10.2 palette-collision three-tier decision tree (ratified inline — accept / expand-palette / restructure-categories), §5.1 operational-density gloss (library / operational / ceremonial altitude framing), §6 data-domain glyph requirement (16px-readable + domain-unfamiliar-meaningful for operational-state icons). Commitment chronicled: SEP_DASHBOARD_DESIGN_PRINCIPLES.md v0.1 within 30 days (by 2026-05-19).

cipher.note: Bridged per cc-025 §G. Seated committee member; Cluster A Censor voice (Codewright register, terse staccato). Position authored: LGTM on §§1-7, §9, §11 structure. Architectural cleanup dominant contribution: §10 inline-answer mapping (6 resolved, 2 escalated) authored primarily by Cipher; result satisfied Nyx's conditional-reject threshold (zero open questions in ratified v1.0). §11.4 cite cc-012 + cc-014 explicitly concur with Aurelius. §8 deletion preference compatible with Petra's substantive-inline amendment.

nyx.note: Bridged per cc-025 §G. Seated committee member; Cluster B Censor voice (Contrarian register, premise-auditor). First operational exercise of Cluster B cross-Cluster stress-test role. Position authored: §4.0 cross-Cluster stress-test paragraph canonized as new structural discipline (each Cluster's Censor stress-tests Republic-wide proposals before ratification), §4.2 Cluster-preservation clause for records-are-Codex resilience (protects against institutional capture by Cluster A-centric chronicling). Premise audits: §0 drift-is-real (clears), §9 Province-doc obligation is not over-reach (clears), §10.5 typography mandate is over-reach (resolved no-mandate). Conditional reject on ≥3 §10 open questions did not fire — synthesis resolved §10 to zero open.

logs.session_title: Capital Foundation v0.2 — Bulletin Wall, The Order, Pre-Ship Harness
logs.protocol: canon-cc-012 per-block for Ashara/Petra profile ratification; canon-cc-009 dual-Builder Monument discipline for co-Build; canon-cc-014 hat-switch acknowledged
logs.stage: Foundation (not yet complete) — 11 of 13 criteria complete, 2 partial

bard.note: Narrative framing for the Hearth bulletin wall — 'a hearth with a bulletin board on one wall — warm presence first, legible activity second, demands last or never.' Voice drawn from Constitution Appendix C; profile unratified.

consul.note: Referenced repeatedly (canon-cc-005, canon-cc-012, multi-session governance flow proposal) but not summoned. Same-agent-drift would have made in-session summons redundant with Ashara and Petra's voices; Sovereign's proposed multi-session flow is the structural remedy (queued, not exercised this session).

aurelius.note: Handoff artifacts consumed pre-session — CHARTER.md, ROADMAP.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, 14-room scaffold, lore-007, 9 v0.3-draft profiles, canon-cc-012, canon-cc-014. Decrees 0001-0003 addressed TO him for Codex import.

cipher.note: Out of cluster — Cipher is Censor for Cluster A (Codex + SproutLab); CC is Monument, not Cluster A. Canon-cc-008 defers Censor review until after Governors; no Governors seated at CC. Cipher pass applied grep-style per-commit by Petra (HR-2/3, canon-0001/0013/0004/0023 sweep); not a substitute for real Cipher review — gap flagged in Foundation criterion ledger (Hard Rules 1-12 compliance: partial).

revisions.note: Migrated to canon-0053 v1 schema on Codex. Path moved from command-center:docs/companion-logs/companion-log-s-2026-04-17-01.md to codex:docs/companion-logs/command-center/companion-log-s-2026-04-17-01-ash.md (records-are-Codex; alphabetical dual-author precedence per §1 gives ashara as primary_author and -ash filename suffix). Frontmatter: author string → authors[] + primary_author: ashara; repo: Command-Center → canonical slug command-center; secondary_repos: [codex] added for decree transport via Ostia; monument_stage → stage (generalized); added schema_version/session_type: build/protocol/duration_minutes/outputs/tags/revisions. Rounds migrated to Form C for bard (in_session + note), consul (referenced + note), aurelius (pre_session + note), cipher (self_review + note per §4 mode taxonomy — the session's explicit Cipher-substitute-via-self-grep pattern is the canonical example of the self_review mode). §3 Structural observations already present; §4 'For the Sovereign' already canonical. Body: single content correction — line referencing lore-008 for orientation/manifest handling updated to lore-012-the-orientation-lock-detour per commit bbf38fe (lore-008 collision housekeeping renamed orientation-lock lore to lore-012; lore-008-the-premature-file retained original slot). duration_minutes/commits_count/files_touched_count left null — retro-migration by Codex Chronicler; no honest number available without reconstruction. Origin-repo copy (command-center:docs/companion-logs/...) to be deleted in a separate CC-side cleanup commit per canon-0053 §7.
